title: Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak With Hemp Oil
features: SOAK AWAY ACHES & PAINS: Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Natural Hemp Oil, relieves tired, aching muscles. Re-sealable pack. Suitable for all skin types, use regularly to revive fatigued muscles
SOOTHING & RELAXING: Add two handfuls of Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Natural Hemp Oil to a warm, running bath water for a wonderfully soothing and relaxing bath
QUICK RELAXING BATH: Soak for only a minimum of 20 minutes in a warm bath with Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with menthol to soften skin and to be absorbed
POST WORKOUT MUSCLE RELIEF: Use Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak after running, cycling, gardening, or a gym visit to relax the aches and pains, to leave you calm and relaxed
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with natural hemp oil, 450g re-sealable pack. Search amazon.co.uk for a range of Elysium Spa products
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Natural Hemp Oil, relieves tired, aching muscles. Re-sealable pack. Suitable for all skin types, use regularly to revive fatigued muscles. Add two handfuls of Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Natural Hemp Oil to a warm, running bath water for a wonderfully soothing and relaxing bath. Soak for only a minimum of 20 minutes in a warm bath with Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with menthol to soften skin and to be absorbed. Search amazon.co.uk for a range of Elysium Spa products. Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with natural hemp oil, 450g re-sealable pack Directions Add two handfuls of the product to a warm, running bath. Soak for a minimum of 20 minutes. Use after workouts for muscle relief. Re-seal the pack after use. Safety Warning Always read the label. Keep out of reach of children. Do not use in a bath with very hot water. Avoid contact with eyes. If skin irritation occurs, rinse thoroughly and discontinue use. See more
